description_long: This is a modern motorcycle helmet with a streamlined, aerodynamic shell and a full-face visor that covers the entire front. The helmet features a two-tone color scheme, primarily beige with black and dark gray accents, and has a glossy finish. The top of the helmet displays a central black stripe pattern, while the sides have geometric graphics and branding text. The rear of the helmet shows the 'MTX' logo, and there are visible vent structures on the top and sides for airflow. The visor appears to be slightly tinted and is integrated into the helmet's front, with a circular hinge mechanism on each side. The overall design suggests a focus on both safety and style, suitable for urban motorcyclists.
description: A beige and black full-face motorcycle helmet with a glossy finish, geometric graphics, and a tinted visor. Features include top and side vents, branding, and a streamlined, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full-face tinted visor, central top vent, and the helmet's aerodynamic shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the circular visor hinge, side vent, and geometric black graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'MTX' logo, central black stripe, and the helmet's rounded back.
description_view_3: Right side view with visible visor hinge, side vent, and additional branding text.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'MTX' logo is visible on the rear of the helmet, rendered in black text on the beige surface.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: There is a central vent on the top and additional vents on the sides, all rectangular and integrated into the helmet's shell.
attribute_graphic_design: The helmet features a geometric graphic design with a central black stripe, angular side patterns, and branding text.
